title: ononis laxiflora subsp. grandiflora
intro: Ononis laxiflora subsp. grandiflora, also known as the Spurred Carnation or Broad-leaved Spurred Vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis laxiflora subsp. grandiflora include its ability to relieve symptoms of nephritis, reduce inflammation, and promote the removal of toxins from the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
